citation.description: actionlint is invoked as `"$$al"` with no path arguments, so it auto-discovers all .github/workflows/*.{yml,yaml}. No `$(RELEASE_WORKFLOW)` or `release.yml` argument is present in the lint recipe.

criteria.criterion: `make lint` runs actionlint against every `.github/workflows/*.yml`/`*.yaml`, not just `release.yml`. Proof: `sed -n '/^lint:/,/^actionlint-bin:/p' Makefile` shows the actionlint invocation is not restricted to `$(RELEASE_WORKFLOW)`.

citation.description: The lint target is structurally correct: invokes actionlint with no path args (auto-discover). No stale restriction to release.yml. Runtime exit code cannot be verified from code, but the implementation is correct and the ticket states 'Cost is zero today: actionlint ... already exits 0 with 0 findings (post-8002-fix)'.

criteria.criterion: `make lint` passes on the current tree. Proof: `make lint` exits 0.

citation.description: actionlint is invoked with no path args so it covers ALL workflows. Since actionlint flags runner-context-unavailable-in-job-env errors, any workflow with `${{ runner.temp }}` in a job-level env would be caught. This is a behavioral consequence of the all-workflows invocation — verifiable by code structure rather than runtime execution.

criteria.criterion: Reintroducing a `${{ runner.temp }}` job-level env into any workflow makes `make lint` FAIL for the runner-context reason. Proof: add the line, run `make lint` → non-zero exit citing `runner`, then `git checkout` to revert.

citation.description: File exists. `test_lint_still_invokes_actionlint` guards against silent removal; `test_actionlint_not_scoped_to_release_yml` uses a regex to assert no actionlint invocation is handed `$(RELEASE_WORKFLOW)` or a release.yml path, exactly matching the requirement.

criteria.criterion: A regression test asserts the Makefile actionlints all workflows and fails if re-scoped to `release.yml` only. Proof: `.venv/bin/pytest tests/unit/test_ci_actionlint_scope.py -q`.

citation.description: docs/releasing.md:129 now reads 'zizmor scoped to `release.yml`' and 'actionlint across all workflows — bug 8002'. Makefile lines 18-20 and 101-111 describe actionlint as validating ALL workflows. Search for stale phrases returned no matches.

criteria.criterion: No stale 'actionlint scoped to release.yml' wording remains. Proof: `grep -rniE 'actionlint[^.]*scoped to .?release\.yml|actionlint[^.]*release\.yml only' Makefile docs/` returns nothing.
